document_title: Phase 1 Intelligence Summary — High-Ticket VIF Optimizer

results.variance_inflation: Estimated coefficient variance is 41.26x greater than it would be under full orthogonality. The OLS estimator cannot isolate this channel's marginal revenue contribution.
results.remediation: Composite index construction with Influencer_Fees, or PCA-based dimensionality reduction

results.variance_inflation: Estimated coefficient variance is 41.20x greater than it would be under full orthogonality. Statistically indistinguishable from Social_Media_Spend in the current design matrix.
results.remediation: Composite index construction with Social_Media_Spend, domain-driven elimination, or PCA

results.variance_inflation: 1.06x — effectively orthogonal. Coefficient estimate is stable and reliable.

audit_metrics.overall_verdict: CRITICAL — mandatory remediation required before any regression training or budget attribution model is deployed

notable_pairs.interpretation: 97.5% of the variance in each variable is shared with the other, driving both VIF scores to 41+. This is the primary collinearity condition requiring immediate remediation.
Minor negative relationship; no material impact on VIF. No action required.

primary_deliverable.integrity_verdict: VALID — document is specification-compliant and delivery-ready
sections: Cover Page — Full-bleed navy, severity key, analytical epigraph
I.  Strategic Executive Summary — VIF as capital efficiency diagnostic
II. VIF Analysis Results — Colour-coded severity table, KPI metric boxes
III.Recommended Action Plan — Composite Index, PCA, Ridge, Pipeline Gating
IV. Methodology & Technical Appendix — VIF formula, threshold rationale

phase_2_mandate.name: Remediation Engine
phase_2_mandate.objective: Design, implement, and validate multicollinearity remediation strategies that drive all predictor VIF scores below 5.0, restoring the dataset to a model-ready state.
candidate_strategies: Composite Index Construction — weighted average of the two collinear channels
Principal Component Analysis — orthogonal decomposition of the collinear subspace
Domain-Driven Variable Elimination — remove the lower-signal variable entirely
Ridge Regression (L2) — interim stabilisation of coefficient estimates pending structural fix
phase_2_mandate.success_criterion: All seven (or restructured) predictor VIF scores verified below 5.0 via automated recomputation and documented in a Phase 2 audit report.
